process_character_build.script_code:
import json

# Get class info
class_info = call_tool('local-dnd_get_class', class_name=class_name)
if not class_info.get('success'):
    result = {'error': f"Failed to get class info for {class_name}"}
    return

class_data = class_info.get('class', {})

# Get race info
race_info = call_tool('local-dnd_get_race', race_name=race_name)
if not race_info.get('success'):
    result = {'error': f"Failed to get race info for {race_name}"}
    return

race_data = race_info.get('race', {})

# Get equipment categories - we'll get a few key categories
# We'll try to get weapon and armor categories
weapon_equipment = call_tool('local-dnd_get_equipment_category', category='weapon')
armor_equipment = call_tool('local-dnd_get_equipment_category', category='armor')
adventuring_gear = call_tool('local-dnd_get_equipment_category', category='adventuring-gear')

# Calculate combat rating
hit_die = class_data.get('hit_die', 0)
hit_die_score = 0
if hit_die == 12:
    hit_die_score = 30
elif hit_die == 10:
    hit_die_score = 25
elif hit_die == 8:
    hit_die_score = 20
elif hit_die == 6:
    hit_die_score = 15
else:
    hit_die_score = 10

# Determine armor proficiency from class proficiencies
proficiencies = class_data.get('proficiencies', [])
armor_proficiency_score = 10  # default None
if any('heavy' in prof.lower() for prof in proficiencies):
    armor_proficiency_score = 40
elif any('medium' in prof.lower() for prof in proficiencies):
    armor_proficiency_score = 30
elif any('light' in prof.lower() for prof in proficiencies):
    armor_proficiency_score = 20

# Determine weapon proficiency
weapon_proficiency_score = 15  # default Simple
if any('martial' in prof.lower() for prof in proficiencies):
    weapon_proficiency_score = 30

combat_rating = hit_die_score + armor_proficiency_score + weapon_proficiency_score

# Calculate versatility score (simplified)
# Based on number of proficiencies, saving throws, and ability bonuses
proficiency_count = len(proficiencies)
saving_throws_count = len(class_data.get('saving_throws', []))
ability_bonuses_count = len(race_data.get('ability_bonuses', []))
traits_count = len(race_data.get('traits', []))

# Simple versatility calculation (0-100 scale)
versatility_base = min(proficiency_count * 3, 30)  # max 30
versatility_saves = saving_throws_count * 10  # max 20 (2 saves)
versatility_abilities = ability_bonuses_count * 5  # max 30 (6 abilities)
versatility_traits = traits_count * 5  # max 20 (4 traits)

versatility_score = min(versatility_base + versatility_saves + versatility_abilities + versatility_traits, 100)

# Extract relevant class info
class_result = {
    'name': class_data.get('name', class_name),
    'hit_die': hit_die,
    'proficiencies': proficiencies,
    'saving_throws': class_data.get('saving_throws', []),
    'proficiency_choices': class_data.get('proficiency_choices', [])
}

# Extract relevant race info
race_result = {
    'name': race_data.get('name', race_name),
    'speed': race_data.get('speed', 30),
    'ability_bonuses': race_data.get('ability_bonuses', []),
    'traits': race_data.get('traits', []),
    'starting_proficiencies': race_data.get('starting_proficiencies', [])
}

# Equipment summary
equipment_summary = {
    'weapon_count': weapon_equipment.get('category', {}).get('total_items', 0) if weapon_equipment.get('success') else 0,
    'armor_count': armor_equipment.get('category', {}).get('total_items', 0) if armor_equipment.get('success') else 0,
    'gear_count': adventuring_gear.get('category', {}).get('total_items', 0) if adventuring_gear.get('success') else 0
}

result = {
    'build_name': build_name,
    'class': class_result,
    'race': race_result,
    'equipment_summary': equipment_summary,
    'combat_rating': combat_rating,
    'versatility_score': versatility_score,
    'combat_breakdown': {
        'hit_die_score': hit_die_score,
        'armor_proficiency_score': armor_proficiency_score,
        'weapon_proficiency_score': weapon_proficiency_score
    }
}
process_character_build.description: Process a single D&D character build: get class info, race info, equipment categories, calculate combat rating and versatility score

process_character_build_fixed.script_code:
import json

# Get class info
class_info = call_tool('local-dnd_get_class', class_name=class_name)
if not class_info.get('success'):
    result = {'error': f"Failed to get class info for {class_name}"}
else:
    class_data = class_info.get('class', {})
    
    # Get race info
    race_info = call_tool('local-dnd_get_race', race_name=race_name)
    if not race_info.get('success'):
        result = {'error': f"Failed to get race info for {race_name}"}
    else:
        race_data = race_info.get('race', {})
        
        # Get equipment categories - we'll get a few key categories
        # We'll try to get weapon and armor categories
        weapon_equipment = call_tool('local-dnd_get_equipment_category', category='weapon')
        armor_equipment = call_tool('local-dnd_get_equipment_category', category='armor')
        adventuring_gear = call_tool('local-dnd_get_equipment_category', category='adventuring-gear')
        
        # Calculate combat rating
        hit_die = class_data.get('hit_die', 0)
        hit_die_score = 0
        if hit_die == 12:
            hit_die_score = 30
        elif hit_die == 10:
            hit_die_score = 25
        elif hit_die == 8:
            hit_die_score = 20
        elif hit_die == 6:
            hit_die_score = 15
        else:
            hit_die_score = 10
        
        # Determine armor proficiency from class proficiencies
        proficiencies = class_data.get('proficiencies', [])
        armor_proficiency_score = 10  # default None
        if any('heavy' in prof.lower() for prof in proficiencies):
            armor_proficiency_score = 40
        elif any('medium' in prof.lower() for prof in proficiencies):
            armor_proficiency_score = 30
        elif any('light' in prof.lower() for prof in proficiencies):
            armor_proficiency_score = 20
        
        # Determine weapon proficiency
        weapon_proficiency_score = 15  # default Simple
        if any('martial' in prof.lower() for prof in proficiencies):
            weapon_proficiency_score = 30
        
        combat_rating = hit_die_score + armor_proficiency_score + weapon_proficiency_score
        
        # Calculate versatility score (simplified)
        # Based on number of proficiencies, saving throws, and ability bonuses
        proficiency_count = len(proficiencies)
        saving_throws_count = len(class_data.get('saving_throws', []))
        ability_bonuses_count = len(race_data.get('ability_bonuses', []))
        traits_count = len(race_data.get('traits', []))
        
        # Simple versatility calculation (0-100 scale)
        versatility_base = min(proficiency_count * 3, 30)  # max 30
        versatility_saves = saving_throws_count * 10  # max 20 (2 saves)
        versatility_abilities = ability_bonuses_count * 5  # max 30 (6 abilities)
        versatility_traits = traits_count * 5  # max 20 (4 traits)
        
        versatility_score = min(versatility_base + versatility_saves + versatility_abilities + versatility_traits, 100)
        
        # Extract relevant class info
        class_result = {
            'name': class_data.get('name', class_name),
            'hit_die': hit_die,
            'proficiencies': proficiencies,
            'saving_throws': class_data.get('saving_throws', []),
            'proficiency_choices': class_data.get('proficiency_choices', [])
        }
        
        # Extract relevant race info
        race_result = {
            'name': race_data.get('name', race_name),
            'speed': race_data.get('speed', 30),
            'ability_bonuses': race_data.get('ability_bonuses', []),
            'traits': race_data.get('traits', []),
            'starting_proficiencies': race_data.get('starting_proficiencies', [])
        }
        
        # Equipment summary
        equipment_summary = {
            'weapon_count': weapon_equipment.get('category', {}).get('total_items', 0) if weapon_equipment.get('success') else 0,
            'armor_count': armor_equipment.get('category', {}).get('total_items', 0) if armor_equipment.get('success') else 0,
            'gear_count': adventuring_gear.get('category', {}).get('total_items', 0) if adventuring_gear.get('success') else 0
        }
        
        result = {
            'build_name': build_name,
            'class': class_result,
            'race': race_result,
            'equipment_summary': equipment_summary,
            'combat_rating': combat_rating,
            'versatility_score': versatility_score,
            'combat_breakdown': {
                'hit_die_score': hit_die_score,
                'armor_proficiency_score': armor_proficiency_score,
                'weapon_proficiency_score': weapon_proficiency_score
            }
        }
process_character_build_fixed.description: Process a single D&D character build: get class info, race info, equipment categories, calculate combat rating and versatility score
